2605.22502.title: Compiling Agentic Workflows into LLM Weights: Near-Frontier Quality at Two Orders of Magnitude Less Cost
2605.22502.paper_summary: Agent orchestration frameworks have proliferated, collectively exceeding 290,000 GitHub stars across LangGraph, CrewAI, Google ADK, OpenAI Agents SDK, Semantic Kernel, Strands, and LlamaIndex. All follow the same pattern: an external orchestrator above the LLM, injecting instructions and routing decisions every turn. Recent work has shown this architecture is dominated for procedural tasks by simply providing the procedure in a frontier model's system prompt [Dennis et al., 2026a], at the cost of consuming the context window, requiring a frontier model for every conversation, and exposing proprietary procedures to third-party providers. Compiling the procedure into the weights of a small fine-tuned model -- creating a subterranean agent -- should resolve all of these concerns, and prior work (SimpleTOD, FireAct, SynTOD, WorkflowLLM, Agent Lumos) has shown the technique works. Yet developer adoption has overwhelmingly favored orchestration. We identify three perceived barriers and address each empirically across travel booking (14 nodes), Zoom support (14 nodes, product-specific knowledge), and insurance claims (55 nodes, 6 decision hubs).
2605.22502.paper_summary_zh: 代理協調框架已經大量增長，LangGraph、CrewAI、Google ADK、OpenAI Agents SDK、Semantic Kernel、Strands 和 LlamaIndex 的 GitHub 星數總計超過 290,000。所有這些框架都遵循相同的模式：在 LLM 之上有一個外部協調器，每次轉換時注入指令和路由決策。最近的研究顯示，這種架構在程序性任務中占主導地位，只需在前沿模型的系統提示中提供程序 [Dennis et al., 2026a]，但這會消耗上下文窗口，要求每次對話都使用前沿模型，並將專有程序暴露給第三方供應商。將程序編譯進小型微調模型的權重中——創建一個地下代理——應該能解決所有這些問題，而先前的工作（SimpleTOD、FireAct、SynTOD、WorkflowLLM、Agent Lumos）已經顯示這種技術是有效的。然而，開發者的採用卻壓倒性地偏向於協調。我們識別了三個感知的障礙，並在旅行訂票（14 個節點）、Zoom 支援（14 個節點，產品特定知識）和保險索賠（55 個節點，6 個決策中心）中實證解決每一個問題。
2605.22502.author: Simon Dennis et.al.
2605.22502.authors: Simon Dennis, Rivaan Patil, Kevin Shabahang, Hao Guo
